data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "All substantive fixes landed on main (371/372/373). The remaining verifier flag is the 'decide whether to ship voter logs to CloudWatch' criterion — that decision WAS made and documented in infra/runbooks/review-bot-ops.md: do NOT ship (the host is SSM-managed, so journald is reachable read-only on demand, which sufficed to root-cause this incident; a CloudWatch log group adds cost + an agent for a single-host low-volume service; revisit if diagnosis frequency or host count grows). The verifier read 'decide' as 'must ship'; the criterion is satisfied by the documented decision. Closing unsigned by design.". Session: c005f242b.
